feed.title: AO3 - Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Derek Hale/Stiles Stilinski on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: To Safe Your Life
entry.summary:
Author: DoEScasTIElLove

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,840Chapters: 4/11Kudos: 43

Summary: Scott has been turned into a werewolf just before their last year of high school. Managing him on full moons without any help turns almost fatal for Stiles until a dark, brooding wolf swoops in and saves his life. Apparently, he had to bite him to do that, not transforming him but bonding them together as mates.As it turns out, the Hale pack is alive and thriving, and the hunters are after them, but how could Stiles concentrate on that. He has to figure out what being werewolf mated to Derek actually means.

entry.title: No more
entry.summary:
Author: ForgottenOne201

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,100Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 77

entry.title: Not just a useless human (English version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 37,755Chapters: 17/17Kudos: 30

Summary: Stiles Stilinski is alone. Scott abandoned him to join Derek's pack, and he's not welcome. He tries to build a new life, but trouble seems to be targeting him even though he's cut ties with the supernatural. Alpha packs, serial killers, and now a disease he hoped he wouldn't have. Stiles will soon discover that everything he knew about himself was a lie.

entry.title: Some Of Us Are Human
entry.summary:
Author: Kass_Writes

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,381Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 956

Summary: In which Stiles is kicked out of Scott’s pack and the Sheriff is tired of Scott McCall hurting his son. He calls in reinforcements and those reinforcements come to clean up the mess of Beacon Hills while also kicking some serious True Alpha ass. Scott McCall will learn one thing by the time it’s all over………………….. No one is allowed to hurt Stiles EVER.

entry.title: A Very Stilinski Affair
entry.summary:
Author: Christina786

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,703Chapters: 9/15Kudos: 18

Summary: Derek frowned. “You Stilinskis really have to be that honest?”She shrugged. “What’s the point in being secretive and mysterious?”Now Derek grinned “Oh, you should meet my uncle, you’d hate him.” This is based on a post on tumblr in which Stiles is afraid that Derek might fall for his sibling once he meets them. It kind of got out of hand and I started indulging in some morally gray but not evil Peter. Basically, Peter falls for Stiles' sister instead, because they kind of bond over their different but slightly similar traumas and it turns out Stiles' sister has been hiding a few bodies in her closet.

entry.title: Governor-Elect
entry.summary:
Author: Glyphemum

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 43,505Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 5

Summary: The debate should have changed everything. In some ways, it does. Derek Hale has finally become the candidate Stiles always suspected he could be: controlled but not empty, dangerous only because he refuses to become what his enemies keep trying to prove he is. The campaign has momentum, the race is close, and Kate Argent is no longer winning every room she walks into. Which means Gerard stops treating this like politics. As the final stretch turns uglier, Derek faces exposure, provocation, planted evidence, old wounds, and the constant pressure to become ruthless enough to survive. Stiles is done pretending this is only professional. Lydia is holding the campaign together with strategy, rage, and terrifying competence. The pack is no longer just protecting Derek from the shadows — they are protecting the people Derek is trying to serve. The mate bond is no longer something Derek can simply endure in silence. But if Stiles chooses him, it has to be because he knows the truth. All of it. A final campaign. A final trap. A narrow path through fear. And maybe, if they can win clean, something like a future.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Brutal
entry.summary:
Author: arthurvittal

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,765Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 12

Summary: Amidst the forest bathed in the unparalleled light of the full moon, rain, blood, and mud intertwine with the fate of Stiles Stilinski, a young man on the brink of collapse between the genuine love of Derek Hale and the murderous violence of his ex, Theo Raeken.In the wake of pain, transformation, and buried secrets, Theo awakens to something he doesn't yet understand, but which consumes him from the inside out. Rage, instinct, memory, and fear drag him deeper into his obsession—which, in truth, had never left his mind.Meanwhile, Derek and Stiles try to resume a daily life that seems only possible through sarcasm, sharp jokes, and stolen kisses. But, unfortunately, Beacon Hills never forgets. And behind the tenderness lie wounds too deep, unconfessed sins, and a threat that breathes hungrily behind its shadows.This is an intense, overwhelming, and resilient novel. Where we talk about love in times of total darkness, about monsters that live inside and outside the skin, and about what remains of us when we are forced to survive, between brutality and kindness.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: An Endless Road to (re)Discover
entry.summary:
Author: evvrythingisawesome

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,367Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 20

Summary: Sheriff Stilinski recovers from his injury and tries to keep the pack together in the absence of their Alpha; Chris Argent struggles with guilt over his role in the pack's recent troubles; Teal'c tries to balance his responsibilities to the pack with his obligations to the Free Jaffa Nation and the SGC; Daniel Jackson supports Derek through his quest for the truth of his lost Hale ancestor and his search for his sister.

entry.summary:
Author: strawberry_chicken

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,714Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 43

Summary: (End season 2) After a ritual gone wrong, Stiles should be dead. Instead, he wakes up with a hole in his body and something inside him—something wrong, something hungry. Derek knows there's a threat in town. He just didn't expect it to look like Stiles.

entry.title: The Log of the Triskelion, Struck Pages: On the Taste of Salt, On the Weight of Amber Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: am0rawr

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,498Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: From the depths of the sea, where songs are not fashioned to seduce but to devour souls, Captain Derek Hale retrieves a treasure no chart ever promised. Stiles arrives wrapped in shattered glass and silences; eyes of ancient amber, a tale of a lost prince too fragile to be believed, too beautiful to be questioned. In the salt and gunpowder weeks that follow, Derek learns that certain creatures need no cages. They hunt with abyssal patience, weaving confessions and cold caresses until the heart of the prey ripens of its own free will. In the end, only one question will remain, suspended like sea-foam upon the waves: when a predator wears the skin of innocence and offers its own throat, who is the devourer and who is the feast? The sea will tell no tales. But it will keep the secret.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Derek Hale and the Secrets of the Fae
entry.summary:
Author: am0rawr

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,712Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 24

Summary: The door in the tree should not exist. With hunters on his trail and wolfsbane burning through his veins, Derek Hale has no time to question impossibilities; he forces it open and falls into the dark. When he wakes, the world is different: a ceiling of living branches, light with no source, and a strange fae with bluish skin chattering as he tends to Derek’s wounds. Stiles collects lichens, wears flowers that shift with moods Derek cannot read, and his wings scatter light across the walls. He is chaotic, eccentric, entirely other, and carries a beauty that belongs to no world Derek has ever known. Derek never asked to be saved. Never asked for the endless garden, or for the way his heart stumbles whenever those eyes linger on him. But the Fae Realm has laws: guests must rest, and no one dies without permission. Leaving, Derek is learning, may be another matter. When he returns to Beacon Hills, he does not return alone. The pack has questions. The hunters still circle. And the fae at his side smiles like he knows something no one else does. No one in Beacon Hills knows the Fair Folk. Least of all Derek.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
